analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet reports that EU HR/VP Josep Borrell spoke with US Secretary of State Mike Pompeo about COVID-19, emphasizing cooperation and solidarity, and stating that the EU and US can significantly contribute to international efforts against the pandemic. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – Not directly; no reference to EU’s historical success or overcoming internal obstacles. EU2 (EU is united) – Not explicit; mentions solidarity in general (EU–US), not internal EU unity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – No; focuses on international cooperation, not EU domestic benefits. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – No pioneering/regulatory leadership claim here. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – No mention of democracy/human rights causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Yes; highlights EU’s role in global cooperation and capacity to contribute to international efforts to tackle a global crisis, fitting the theme of multilateralism and contributing to global well-being. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU6.
